prestazioni: Audi C7.5 A7 S Line Competition (45 TFSI) with **EA888 Gen3B 2.0L TFSI (CZPA)** engine: Full **APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU Software** (320 HP / 450 Nm) paired with **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger** (1.0 bar peak boost), **APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP)** with **Bosch 0261002037 injectors**, and **APR Carbon Fiber Intake System** with **034 Motorsport Silicone Intake Hoses** for optimized airflow and IAT reduction.

KW Suspension **Clubsport Coilover Kit (3-way adjustable)** with **KW-specific A7 (C7.5) chassis-specific valving**, **034 Motorsport Density Line Rear Subframe Bushings**, and **H&R Front & Rear Sway Bars (25mm front, 22mm rear)** to eliminate body roll and enhance turn-in response for the A7's 2,945mm wheelbase.

Full **Milltek Sport 304 Stainless Steel Cat-Back Exhaust System (Non-Resonated)** with **2.5-inch mandrel-bent piping** and **dual 100mm quad-tip outlets**, paired with **Armytrix Valvetronic Downpipes (Catted, 200-cell)** and **APR Catted Race Mid-Pipes** to maximize exhaust scavenging while maintaining OBD-II compliance for the EA888 Gen3B.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit (A7 C7.5-specific)** with **custom 3M Matte Graphite Wrap (Satin finish)**, **OEM+ Audi Sport S Line Competition front bumper lip extension**, and **custom carbon fiber side skirts** (replicating the RS7 Sportback aesthetic) for aggressive stance and aerodynamic refinement.

**Vorsteiner V-FF107 Forged Wheels (20x9.5 ET35 front / 20x11 ET45 rear)** in **Gunmetal Finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)** with **H&R Spacer Kit (15mm front, 25mm rear)** for flush fitment and optimized track geometry.

**OEM Audi RS7 Sportback Carbon Fiber Mirror Caps (Gloss Black)** with **custom LED turn signal indicators (Lux H8 V4s)**, **Vossen CFR Carbon Fiber Rear Diffuser**, and **custom LED taillight tint (Lux Angel Eyes, 50% smoked)** to enhance the A7's coupe silhouette while maintaining functional aerodynamics.
